categories.name: User Access & Licensing
categories.description: Control who can access Microsoft 365 Copilot and licensing configuration

settings.name: Copilot License Assignment
settings.description: Assign Microsoft 365 Copilot add-on licenses to individual users or security groups. Requires qualifying base license (E3, E5, Business Standard, Business Premium, A3, A5).

settings.name: Update Channel Configuration
settings.description: Ensure Microsoft 365 Apps are on Current Channel or Monthly Enterprise Channel (version 2511+) for Copilot compatibility. Required prerequisite.
settings.adminPath: Settings > Org settings > Microsoft 365 installation options

settings.name: Copilot Frontier Access
settings.description: Allow users to access experimental and preview Copilot features through the Frontier Program. Includes early access to Agent Mode, App Builder, and new AI models.

settings.name: Copilot in Microsoft Edge
settings.description: Control availability of Copilot sidebar in Microsoft Edge browser for licensed users.

settings.name: Pin Copilot Chat in M365 Apps
settings.description: Control whether Copilot Chat is pinned in the navigation bar of Microsoft 365 applications for easy access.

settings.name: Copilot in Admin Centers
settings.description: Allow administrators to use Copilot within Microsoft 365, Exchange, SharePoint, and Teams admin centers to query administrative data based on their role.

settings.name: Copilot Dashboard (Viva Insights)
settings.description: Enable the Copilot Dashboard powered by Viva Insights. Set minimum group size for generating organizational insights on Copilot adoption.

categories.name: Data Access & Privacy
categories.description: Control how Copilot processes data and privacy settings for your organization

settings.name: Web Search in Copilot
settings.description: Allow Copilot to use web search to ground responses with real-time internet data. Can be managed tenant-wide or per user group via Cloud Policy.

settings.name: Optional Connected Experiences
settings.description: Control optional connected experiences in Microsoft 365 Apps. Disabling this limits certain Copilot features including web search and third-party integrations.
settings.adminPath: Settings > Org settings > Services > Office cloud policy

settings.name: Copilot Memory & Personalization
settings.description: Allow Copilot to remember user preferences and context across sessions. Users can view, manage, and delete memories from their personalization settings.

settings.name: Opt-out of Model Training
settings.description: Microsoft 365 Copilot does not use customer data to train foundation LLMs. This setting confirms the opt-out status for text and voice data.

settings.name: Content Filtering
settings.description: Control content filtering for blocking harmful, offensive, or inappropriate content in Copilot responses. Uses Azure AI Content Safety.

settings.name: Copilot Chat History Retention
settings.description: Set retention policies for Copilot Chat interaction data. Supports compliance requirements through Microsoft Purview retention policies.
settings.adminPath: Purview > Data lifecycle management > Retention policies

settings.name: People Skills in Copilot
settings.description: Allow AI-powered skill updates for user profiles, manageable from the Microsoft 365 admin center. Copilot can suggest skill updates based on user activity.

settings.name: Network Endpoint Configuration
settings.description: Ensure required network endpoints for Microsoft 365 Copilot are not blocked by firewall or proxy. Critical for Copilot functionality.

categories.name: Copilot Actions & Features
categories.description: Define how Copilot generates responses and which features are available

settings.name: Copilot Image Generation
settings.description: Allow Copilot to generate images using AI (DALL-E/Designer) in response to user prompts. Controls image creation across M365 apps.
settings.adminPath: Copilot > Settings > Copilot actions > Image generation

settings.name: Agent Mode in Word
settings.description: Enable Agent Mode in Word, allowing Copilot to directly edit, refine, and rewrite documents based on natural language prompts. Copilot acts as an active editor.

settings.name: Agent Mode in Excel
settings.description: Enable Agent Mode in Excel, allowing Copilot to analyze data, create formulas, build charts, and perform complex data operations autonomously.

settings.name: Agent Mode in PowerPoint
settings.description: Enable Agent Mode in PowerPoint, allowing Copilot to create, edit, and enhance presentations including design, layout, and content generation.

settings.name: =COPILOT() Function in Excel
settings.description: Enable the =COPILOT() worksheet function in Excel that allows users to invoke AI capabilities directly in cell formulas.

settings.name: Copilot Pages
settings.description: Control creation and viewing of Copilot Pages —  collaborative AI-generated canvases. Managed via Cloud Policy settings or Conditional Access.

settings.name: Voice Support in Copilot
settings.description: Enable voice interaction with Copilot in Word and PowerPoint. Users can speak commands and receive audio responses.

settings.name: Copilot App Builder
settings.description: Allow users to create and deploy custom apps directly through Copilot using natural language. Part of the Microsoft 365 Copilot suite.

categories.name: Teams Integration
categories.description: Configure Copilot behavior in Microsoft Teams meetings, chats, and channels

settings.name: Copilot in Teams Meetings
settings.description: Control Copilot availability during Teams meetings and events. Options range from fully enabled to requiring saved transcripts.
settings.adminPath: Teams Admin Center > Meetings > Meeting policies > Copilot

settings.name: Meeting Transcription
settings.description: Enable transcription for the Global (Org-wide default) policy. Required prerequisite for Copilot to function in Teams meetings.
settings.adminPath: Teams Admin Center > Meetings > Meeting policies > Recording & transcription

settings.name: Meeting Recording
settings.description: Configure meeting recording settings. Disabling Copilot for a meeting also disables recording and transcription for that meeting.
settings.adminPath: Teams Admin Center > Meetings > Meeting policies > Recording & transcription

settings.name: Voice Isolation
settings.description: Enable voice isolation in Teams Rooms to improve Copilot transcription accuracy by isolating individual speakers.
settings.adminPath: Teams Admin Center > Teams devices > Voice isolation

settings.name: Facilitator Agent in Teams
settings.description: Enable the Facilitator agent that provides real-time meeting notes, action items, and follow-up summaries during Teams meetings.

settings.name: Copilot Chat in Teams
settings.description: Manage Copilot Chat availability and pinning within Microsoft Teams, transitioning from meeting-specific to unified context-aware experience.
settings.adminPath: Teams Admin Center > Copilot > Chat settings

settings.name: AI Meeting Recap Customization
settings.description: Allow users to customize AI-generated notes in meeting recaps, including editing summaries and action items after meetings.
settings.adminPath: Teams Admin Center > Meetings > AI recaps

categories.name: SharePoint & OneDrive
categories.description: Configure Copilot integration with SharePoint sites, document libraries, and OneDrive

settings.name: AI Content Processing
settings.description: Enable Copilot to assist with categorizing, tagging, and securing documents in SharePoint. Includes PII flagging, column filling, and metadata extraction.
settings.adminPath: SharePoint Admin Center > Content services > AI processing

settings.name: Restricted SharePoint Search
settings.description: Implement restricted SharePoint search to control which sites Copilot can index and surface. Protect sensitive content repositories from AI access.
settings.adminPath: SharePoint Admin Center > Search > Restricted search

settings.name: SharePoint Agents
settings.description: Allow site owners to create, manage, approve, and share AI-powered agents within SharePoint for task automation and intelligent assistance.

settings.name: Knowledge Source Integration
settings.description: Configure SharePoint sites, document libraries, folders, and lists as knowledge sources for Copilot Studio agents, enabling real-time data access.

settings.name: SharePoint Advanced Management
settings.description: Use SharePoint Advanced Management (SAM) to control content lifecycles, prevent oversharing, and implement data governance policies for Copilot access.

settings.name: Expanded Grounding (SharePoint Lists & Sites)
settings.description: Allow Copilot Chat to ground responses using SharePoint lists, sites, and document libraries for more contextual and accurate answers.

categories.name: Exchange & Outlook
categories.description: Configure Copilot behavior in Exchange Online and Outlook

settings.name: Copilot in Outlook
settings.description: Enable Copilot in Outlook for email drafting, summarization, coaching, and calendar assistance. Availability depends on Outlook version and mailbox location.

settings.name: Hybrid Mailbox Behavior
settings.description: Configure behavior for hybrid Exchange deployments. Copilot cannot directly access on-premises mailboxes — only cloud mailboxes are supported.

settings.name: Custom Agents in Outlook
settings.description: Allow users to access and interact with custom Copilot Studio agents directly within Outlook for task-specific assistance.
settings.adminPath: Exchange Admin Center > Agents > Outlook agents

categories.name: Microsoft Purview
categories.description: Data security, compliance, and governance controls through Microsoft Purview

settings.name: Sensitivity Labels for Copilot
settings.description: Apply and enforce sensitivity labels that Copilot must respect. Ensures labeled content maintains its protection level when processed by AI.

settings.name: DLP Policies for Copilot
settings.description: Set Data Loss Prevention policies that apply to Copilot interactions. Prevent sensitive data from being exposed through AI-generated responses.
settings.adminPath: Purview > Data loss prevention > Policies > Copilot

settings.name: Copilot Data Retention Policies
settings.description: Set retention and deletion policies for data generated by Copilot interactions. Supports regulatory compliance and data lifecycle management.
settings.adminPath: Purview > Data lifecycle management > Retention policies

settings.name: Data Access Governance Reports
settings.description: Identify overshared data across Microsoft 365 (SharePoint sites, OneDrive, Teams). Send access reviews to site owners to remediate oversharing risks.

settings.name: eDiscovery for Copilot Data
settings.description: Use Microsoft Purview eDiscovery to search, hold, and export Copilot interaction data for legal and compliance investigations.

settings.name: Unified Audit Logging for Copilot
settings.description: Enable unified audit logging to capture user and admin Copilot activities. Essential for monitoring usage, detecting risks, and compliance reporting.

categories.name: Agent Governance
categories.description: Control AI agent creation, deployment, connectors, and approval workflows

settings.name: Agent Creation Permissions
settings.description: Control who can create and publish AI agents in your organization. Define which users or groups have agent creation privileges.

settings.name: Agent Deployment Approval
settings.description: Configure approval workflows for deploying agents. Define review processes for high-impact use cases before agents go live.

settings.name: Pre-built Microsoft Agents
settings.description: Control which pre-built Microsoft 365 agents are available to users, including agent permissions, data access requirements, and usage terms.

settings.name: Custom MCP Connectors
settings.description: Allow admins to create and deploy custom Model Context Protocol (MCP) connectors to integrate proprietary data sources with Copilot.
settings.adminPath: M365 Admin Center > Settings > Copilot > Connectors > MCP

settings.name: Federated Connectors Governance
settings.description: Govern availability of federated connectors. Review, enable, and disable connectors. Connector Usage Report provides activity insights.
settings.adminPath: M365 Admin Center > Settings > Copilot > Federated connectors

settings.name: Third-Party Copilot Plugins
settings.description: Control third-party Copilot plugins enabled for licensed users. Allow-list specific users/groups or block certain apps to mitigate governance and security risks.
settings.adminPath: M365 Admin Center > Settings > Integrated Apps > Copilot plugins

settings.name: Agents in Viva Engage Communities
settings.description: Deploy AI agents within Viva Engage communities to facilitate discussions, answer questions, and enhance community engagement.
settings.adminPath: Viva Admin Center > Engage > Agent settings

settings.name: Microsoft Agent 365 Control Plane
settings.description: The centralized control plane for managing all AI agents across Microsoft 365. Provides identity, policy, and lifecycle management for agents.

categories.name: Power Platform & Fabric
categories.description: Copilot settings for Power Platform, Dynamics 365, and Microsoft Fabric (including Power BI)
categories.adminCenter: Power Platform Admin Center / Fabric Admin

settings.name: Copilot in Power Apps
settings.description: Enable Copilot capabilities in Power Apps, including AI-assisted app development, formula generation, and natural language queries.
settings.adminPath: Power Platform Admin Center > Environments > Settings > Copilot

settings.name: Copilot in Power BI / Fabric
settings.description: Control Copilot and Azure OpenAI Service tenant settings for Microsoft Fabric and Power BI. Manage user access and data processing policies.
settings.adminPath: Fabric Admin Portal > Tenant settings > Copilot and Azure OpenAI Service

settings.name: Copilot Data Collection & Feedback
settings.description: Control data collection and user feedback mechanisms for Copilot in Power Platform and Dynamics 365.
settings.adminPath: Power Platform Admin Center > Settings > Data collection

settings.name: Copilot Studio AI Publishing
settings.description: Control publication of copilots with AI features from Copilot Studio. Define who can publish and to which channels.
settings.adminPath: Power Platform Admin Center > Copilot Studio > Publishing

settings.name: Block Copilot Studio Free Trial
settings.description: Block free trial sign-ups for Copilot Studio using Azure PowerShell tenant-level controls.

categories.name: Security & Compliance
categories.description: Security posture management, conditional access, and compliance controls for AI

settings.name: Conditional Access for Copilot
settings.description: Review and adjust Conditional Access policies to ensure they don't inadvertently block Copilot. Configure policies specific to AI workloads.
settings.adminPath: Entra ID > Security > Conditional Access > Policies

settings.name: AI Security Posture Management
settings.description: Use Microsoft Defender AI Security Posture Management to maintain a risk-based inventory of AI agents, assess security posture, and identify vulnerabilities.

settings.name: Information Barriers for Copilot
settings.description: Configure information barrier policies that restrict Copilot from crossing organizational boundaries, preventing unauthorized data sharing between segments.

settings.name: SIEM Integration for Copilot Logs
settings.description: Integrate Copilot activity logs with Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) systems for centralized security monitoring and alerting.

settings.name: AI Model Selection Policy
settings.description: Configure which AI models are available for Copilot (GPT-5.2, Anthropic Claude via partnership). Part of Microsoft's model choice expansion.

settings.name: Multi-Agent Architecture Controls
settings.description: Configure controls for multi-agent architectures where multiple AI agents can work together on complex workflows. Define inter-agent communication policies.
